Annual parameter scores (dataframe)

Source: R/data.R
df_score.Rd

Dataframe containing annual parameter scores.

Usage

df_score

Format

A dataframe with 15-17 columns:

Year

Year

Site_Name

Site name

Site_ID

Site ID

Town

Town

Watereshed

Watershed

Group

Site group

Depth

Depth category

Parameter

Parameter

Unit

Result unit

score_typ

How annual score is calculated. Values: Minimum, Maximum, Average, Median, NA

score_num

Numeric score

score_str

Score. Values: Meets Criteria, Does Not Meet Criteria, Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, No Threshold Established, No Data Available

Longitude

Longitude

Latitude

Latitude

popup_loc

Popup text for map. Describes site.

popup_score

Popup text for map. Describes parameter and score.

alt

Alt text for map

On this page

Developed by Mariel Sorlien.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
